prompt:
Imagine a stylish live-action cafe.
Place dishes suited for the setting, such as cute desserts, lunch, and coffee, on the table.

The subject features an anime character appearing in the live-action space, using a character sheet as a reference.
Poses are random.
Real-time toon rendering quality. Clear cel-shaded edge lines, contrast between anime-style highlights and shadows, 3DCG-based but with a hand-drawn anime texture. Skin has a matte cel-painted look, hair has high-gloss highlight bands, and eyes feature multi-layered gradients.

Analyze elements of the background and character poses, then add hand-drawn annotations to those analyzed elements.
Japanese hand-drawn characters (using hiragana and kanji) and thin hand-drawn lines made with a white pen.
Use arrows and dotted lines to create visual guidance toward specific elements.
The final image should be in an Instagram Story style, designed to look like a direct memo written on a photo.
